rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Granting Leav To File Verified Second Amended Petition; Points And Authorities And Declaration With Exhibits.
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, APRIL 17, 2008 LINE 1. PETITIONER RHONDA COLVIN'S Motion For Order Granting Leave To File Verified Second Amended Petition IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO SEEK TO AMEND IN CONFORMANCE WITH CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT 3.1324 AND THE FILING OF A DECLARATION THAT COMPLIES WITH C.C.P. SECTION 473 AND EXPLAINS WHY THE AMENDMENT IS NECESSARY, WHEN THE FACTS GIVING RISE TO THE CLAIM WERE DISCOVERED AND EXPLAINS THE REASON FOR ANY DELAY IN SEEKING TO AMEND. THE FILING OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS OF APRIL 11, 2008 AND FEBRUARY 20, 2008. =(302/PJM/VC)
